_note: registers: full N/pi sweep family used by Vol 11 1D engine. container: 24-cell vertex count - do not change without engine redesign. lock_threshold: modular resonance tolerance band +/- around each integer node. probes: named probe target blocks for Star Probe and future toolbelt instruments. The sweep engine ignores the probes block. The probe engine reads only its named block.

star_probe.description: KishLattice Star - Crystalline Terminus diagnostic probe

targets.physical_interpretation: Structural medium - IGM column density. Same register as nuclear binding energy and galactic velocity dispersion.
targets.note: If DM clusters at 21/pi, the intergalactic medium carries the structural geometry of the 24-cell lattice.

targets.physical_interpretation: Kinematic timing - bounce dynamics of neutron star fracture. Same register as stellar velocities, protein backbone, TTV deviations.
targets.note: If inter-burst timing clusters at 16/pi, FRB burst dynamics encode the kinematic primary of the 24-cell lattice.
